title: Rama Raksha Stotram
intro: Read Rama Raksha Stotram with Hindi meaning. Chant this sacred hymn to seek the blessings of Lord Rama.
description:
॥ Shri Ram Raksha Stotram ॥

1. Charitam Raghunathasya shatakoti pravistaram.
Ekaikam aksharam pumsam mahapataka nashanam.||
2. Dhyatva nilotpalashyamam Ramam rajivalochanam.
Janaki-Lakshmanopetam jatamukuta manditam.||
3. Sasituna-dhanurbana-panim naktancharantakam.
Svalilaya jagat-tratum avirbhutam-ajam vibhum.||
4. Ramaraksham pathet prajnah papaghnim sarvakamadam.
Shiro me Raghava-patu bhalam Dasharathatmakah.||
5. Kausalleyo drisho patu Vishvamitra-priyah shruti.
Ghranam patu makhatrata mukham Saumitri-vatsalah.||
6. Jihvam vidyanidhih patu kantham Bharatavanditah.
Skandhau divyayudhah patu bhujau bhagneshakarmukah.||
7. Karau Sitapatih patu hridayam Jamadagnyajit.
Madhyam patu Kharadhvansi nabhim Jambavadashrayah.||
8. Sugriveshah kati patu saktini Hanumatprabhuh.
Uru Raghuttamah patu rakshahkula vinashakritah.||
9. Januni setukrit patu janghe Dashamukhan-takah.
Padau Vibhishana-shridah patu Ramah-akhilam vapuh.||
10. Etam Ramabalopetam raksham yah sukriti pathet.
Sa chirayuh sukhi putri vijayi vinayi bhavet.||
11. Patalabhutala vyoma charinash-chadmacharinah.
Na drashtumapi shaktaste rakshitam Ramanamabhih.||
12. Rameti Ramabhadreti Ramachandreti va smaran.
Narau na lipyate papair-bhuktim muktim cha vindati.||
13. Jagajjaitraika-mantrena Ramanamnabhirakshitam.
Yah kanthe dharayettasya karasthah sarvasiddhayah.||
14. Vajrapanjara-namedam yo Ramakavacham smaret.
Avyahatajnah sarvatra labhate jayamangalam.||
15. Adishtavan yatha svapne Ramarakshamimam Harah.
Tatha likhitavan pratah prabuddho Budhakaushikah.||
16. Aramah kalpavrikshanam viramah sakalapadam.
Abhiramastrilokanam Ramah shriman sa nah prabhuh.||
17. Tarunau rupasampannau sukumarau mahabalau.
Pundarika-vishalakshau chirakrishnajinambarau.||
18. Phalamulashinau dantau tapasau brahmacharinau.
Putrau Dasharathasyaitau bhratarau Ramalakshmanau.||
19. Sharanyau sarvasattvanam shresthau sarvadhanushtamam.
Rakshahkulani-hantarau trayetam no Raghuttamau.||
20. Attasajjadhanushavishu-sprusha vaksha yashuga-nishanga-sanginau.
Rakshanaya mama Ramalakshmanavagratah pathi sadaiva gachhatam.||
21. Sannaddhah kavachi khadgi chapabanadharo yuva.
Gachhan manorathan nashcha Ramah patu salakshmanah.||
22. Ramo Dasharathi shuro Lakshmananucharo bali.
Kakutsthah purushah purnah Kausalleyo Raghuttamah.||
23. Vedantavedyo yajneshah puranapurushottamah.
Janakivallabhah shriman aprameya-parakramah.||
24. Ityetani japan nityam madbhaktah shraddhayanvitah.
Ashvamedhadhikam punyam samprapnoti na samshayah.||
25. Ramam durvadalashyamam padmaksham pitavasasam.
Stuvanti namabhirdivyairna te samsarino narah.||
26. Ramam Lakshmanapurvajam Raghuv
aram Sitapatim sundaram.
Kakutstham karunarnavam gunanidhim viprapriyam dharmikam.||
27. Rajendram satyasandham Dasharathatanayam shyamalam shantamurtim.
Vande lokabhiramam Raghukulatilakam Raghavam Ravana-arim.||
28. Ramaya Ramabhadraya Ramachandraya vedhase.
Raghunathaya nathaya Sitayah pataye namah.||
29. ShriRama Rama Raghunandana Rama Rama.
ShriRama Rama ranakarkasha Rama Rama.
ShriRama Rama sharanam bhava Rama Rama.||
30. ShriRama chandracharanau manasa smarami.
ShriRama chandracharanau vachasa grinami.
ShriRama chandracharanau shirasa namami.
ShriRama chandracharanau sharanam prapadye.||
31. Mata Ramo matpita Ramachandrah.
Swami Ramo matsakha Ramachandrah.
Sarvasvam me Ramachandro dayalur-nanyam jane naiva jane na jane.||
32. Dakshine Lakshmano yasya vame cha Janakatmaja.
Purato Marutiryasya tam vande Raghunandanam.||
33. Lokabhiramam ranarangadhiram rajivanetram Raghuvanshanatham.
Karunyarupam karunakaram tam ShriRamachandram sharanam prapadye.||
34. Manojavam marutatulyavegam jitendriyam buddhimatam varishtham.
Vatatmajam vanarayuthamukhyam ShriRama dutam sharanam prapadye.||
35. Kujantam Ramarameti madhuram madhuraksharam.
Aruhya kavita-shakham vande Valmiki-kokilam.||
36. Apadamapahartaram dataram sarvasampadam.
Lokabhiramam ShriRamam bhuyo bhuyo namamyaham.||
37. Bharjanam bhavabijanama-rjanam sukhasampadam.
Tarjanam yamadutanam Ramarameti garjanam.||
38. Ramo rajamani sadavijayate Ramam Rameshambhajen.
Ramenabhihata Nishacharachamu Ramaya tasmai namah.||
39. Ramannasti parayanam parataram Ramasya dasosmyaham.
Rame chittalayah sada bhavatu me bho Rama mamuddharah.||
40. Rama Rameti Rameti rame Rame manorame.
Sahastranama tattulyam Ramanama varanane.||

|| Iti Shri Rama Raksha Stotram Sampurnam ||

faq.q1: What is the Ram Raksha Stotram?
faq.a1: The Ram Raksha Stotram is a powerful Sanskrit prayer dedicated to Lord Rama. It is considered a protective "armor" (Kavach) that safeguards the devotee from all kinds of harm, negativity, and fear.
faq.q2: Who authored the Ram Raksha Stotram?
faq.a2: This stotram was authored by Sage Budhakaushika. It is believed that he received the stotram in a dream directly from Lord Shiva.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of reciting this stotram?
faq.a3: Reciting it regularly helps remove fear, anxiety, and negativity. It is believed to grant spiritual protection, mental peace, success in life, and strength to overcome obstacles.
faq.q4: How should one recite the Ram Raksha Stotram?
faq.a4: It is best recited early in the morning after taking a bath, wearing clean clothes, and maintaining a pure and focused mind. Sincerity and devotion are the keys to its effectiveness.
faq.q5: Is there a specific day recommended for recitation?
faq.a5: While it can be recited daily for maximum benefit, many devotees choose to recite it on Tuesdays, Saturdays, and especially on Ram Navami to invoke special blessings.
